scripts.supabase:test:1c: docker exec -i supabase_db_winr psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/tests/1c_integrity.sql
scripts.supabase:test:1d:profiles: docker exec -i supabase_db_winr psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/tests/1d_profiles.sql
scripts.supabase:test:1d:wins: docker exec -i supabase_db_winr psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/tests/1d_wins.sql
scripts.supabase:test:1d:remaining: docker exec -i supabase_db_winr psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/tests/1d_remaining.sql
scripts.supabase:test:1d: npm run supabase:test:1d:profiles && npm run supabase:test:1d:wins && npm run supabase:test:1d:remaining
scripts.supabase:test:1f: docker exec -i supabase_db_winr psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/tests/1f_bootstrap.sql
scripts.supabase:test:1g: docker exec -i supabase_db_winr psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U postgres -d postgres < supabase/tests/1g_notifications.sql
scripts.supabase:test:backend: npm run supabase:test:1c && npm run supabase:test:1d && npm run supabase:test:1f && npm run supabase:test:1g
